## Summary

## Type of change

- [ ] New training method or architecture
- [ ] Educational content (math, references, decision guide, glossary)
- [ ] UI / responsive / accessibility

## Screenshots

## Checks

- [ ] `bun run check` passes (lint + typecheck + format)
- [ ] `bun run build` succeeds
- [ ] Educational claims are sourced when non-obvious
- [ ] No new heavy dependencies without prior issue discussion
- [ ] Dark theme still looks correct
